message:
feat(messages): Add styled error and warning panels (bd-31s)

Add messages module for structured error reporting with:
- ErrorCode enum with E1xx-E5xx categories for Archive/Index/Search/Database/Config errors
- MessageLevel enum (Error/Warning/Info/Success) with icons and labels
- MessagePanel with builder pattern:
  - Error codes and documentation links
  - Detailed context and suggestions
  - Box rendering for styled output
  - Plain text fallback for pipes
- WarningCollector for aggregating multiple warnings
- Pre-built panels for common errors:
  - archive_not_found, index_outdated
  - no_results, query_invalid
  - database_locked

Includes 28 unit tests covering all functionality.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
